programs.title: Better Homes And Gardens
programs.desc: Joh meets a husband and wife team renovating caravans with some style; Karen makes chocolate salted self-saucing pudding; Adam builds a set of shelves perfect for your kid's bedroom.

programs.title: Million Dollar Minute
programs.desc: Million Dollar Minute is a battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test: Can one person, in one minute, win one million dollars?

programs.title: Surf Patrol
programs.desc: Lifesavers respond to reports of a peeping tom in a toilet block. Then, a teenage beachgoer is reported missing.

programs.title: Our Town
programs.desc: A look at various Australian destinations to see why people should visit, live, work, play and invest locally, both regionally and in metropolitan regions.

programs.title: Australia's Deadliest
programs.desc: A young woman is viciously mauled by a great white shark, while a man's holiday is cut short when he is bitten by a deadly brown snake and a young boy goes into anaphylactic shock from an ant bite.
